titles.title: Jesus, You're the Center of My Joy

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, You're the center of my joy All that's good and perfect comes from You You're the heart of my contentment, hope for all I do Jesus, You're the center of my joy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I've lost my direction, You're the compass for my way You're the fire and light when nights are long and cold In sadness, You are the laughter that shatters all my fears And when I'm all alone, Your hand is there to hold

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are why I find pleasure in the simple things of life You're the music in the meadows and the streams The voices of the children, my family and my home You're the source and finisher of my highest dreams
